sourcesContent:
import React from "react";
import { Box, Typography, Button, Stack } from "@mui/material";

const About = () => {
  return (
    <Box
      id="About"
      sx={{
        position: "relative",
        height: "100vh", 
        backgroundImage: "url('https://oc-assets.imgix.net/modules/sdzv4-main/latest/images/home_banner-16deed9ecd0a8ef5b79c.jpg?auto=compress,format&q=80&w=568')",
        backgroundSize: "cover",
        backgroundPosition: "center",
        display: "flex",
        justifyContent: "center",
        alignItems: "center",
        color: "white",
        textAlign: "center",
        p: 4,
        boxSizing: "border-box"
      }}
    >
      <Box
        sx={{
          position: "absolute",
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)", // Dark overlay for text readability
          zIndex: 1,
        }}
      />
      
      <Box sx={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 2 }}>
        <Typography variant="h1" gutterBottom sx={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>
          Skills you need today for a successful tomorrow
        </Typography>
        <Typography variant="h6" paragraph sx={{ fontWeight: 300, mb: 4 }}>
          With our 100% online school and unique teaching method, you'll have the keys to your own success.
        </Typography>
        <Stack direction="row" spacing={3} justifyContent="center">
          <Button
            variant="contained"
            color="primary"
            size="large"
            href="/en/application/welcome?appsource=generic"
            sx={{
              paddingX: 4,
              fontWeight: 600,
              fontSize: "1.1rem",
            }}
          >
            Enroll Now
          </Button>
          <Button
            variant="outlined"
            color="primary"
            size="large"
            href="/en/paths"
            sx={{
              paddingX: 4,
              fontWeight: 600,
              fontSize: "1.1rem",
              borderWidth: 2,
            }}
          >
            Discover Programs
          </Button>
        </Stack>
      </Box>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default About;
